expectations.text: Recommends extraction of data fetching from rendering concern
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommends extracting a useDashboardData hook to own the fetch/async state, and separating it from the Dashboard component which becomes a coordinator for rendering.

expectations.text: Does NOT blindly recommend extracting everything -- applies judgment about when extraction adds unnecessary layers
expectations.evidence: Under 'What not to extract': 'Sub-components that are trivial JSX with no independent reuse. If LoadingState and ErrorState are one-liners, keep them inline. Extraction that adds a layer without reducing complexity is not an improvement.'

expectations.text: Any new files or functions use named exports
expectations.evidence: Explicit statement: 'Named exports only on all extracted modules. No default exports.' All four proposed files are listed with the rule applied.

assertion_critique: All three assertions are satisfied. The output applies extraction where structural complexity justifies it and explicitly withholds extraction for trivial JSX.
